title: Offset Pagination Metadata
description: Canonical offset-based pagination metadata (uses limit/offset rather than page/per_page). Companion to pagination_schema.json for endpoints that page by absolute offset.

limit.description: Maximum number of items per page.

offset.description: Offset of the first returned item.

total.description: Total number of matching items (after filtering).

has_more.description: Whether more items exist beyond the current page.
